description_long: This object represents a human figure dressed as a construction worker, featuring angular and faceted surfaces with minimal anatomical detail. The figure appears to be wearing dark, loose-fitting clothing that drapes over the body, with a broad, conical lower half suggesting work pants or coveralls. There are no visible facial features, hands, or feet, and the head is topped with a flat, angular shape that could represent a helmet or hat. The overall form is stylized and abstract, lacking fine details such as pockets, seams, or accessories. The color palette is dominated by shades of black and dark gray, giving the figure a monolithic appearance. No high-visibility vest, tool belt, or work boots are discernible from the geometry.
description: A stylized, angular construction worker figure in dark, faceted clothing with a broad lower half and minimal detail. The figure is abstract, with no visible accessories or facial features.
description_view_0: The figure's broad, conical lower half and angular upper body are visible, with a flat-topped head and no discernible facial features.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the sharp, angular profile of the head and body, with the extended lower half and no visible arms or accessories.
description_view_2: The back or underside of the figure, showing a large, flat surface with minimal detail and a small rectangular feature near the center.
description_view_3: An angled view emphasizing the faceted surfaces and the flat-topped head, with the lower half appearing wide and draped.
